name: instant-api — ADMIN_PATH_PREFIX 404 rate > 50/min (5m)
description: WARN/CRITICAL on sustained 404 probes against ADMIN_PATH_PREFIX routes — brute-force admin-URL discovery signal. The admin prefix is intentionally non-default (config-only), so legitimate traffic produces near-zero 404s; sustained probes mean someone is scanning. Source: Transaction events where request.uri matches the admin prefix and httpResponseCode is 404.

nrql.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND request.uri LIKE '/admin/%' AND httpResponseCode = '404'
